summary: GM RE Edit and Change Log feature verified. All 7 features PASS: GM can see Edit button on RE projects, open/modify/save RE projects, change logs are created with correct data, and Planning users can see GM's edits in the Edit History section.

success_rate.backend: 80% (8/10 passed - 2 failed due to rate limiting, not actual bugs)

seed_data_creation: Used existing RE projects. Made test edits to 'Test Project 056643' (re_49228631a70b)
context_for_next_testing_agent: GM RE Edit and Change Log feature is fully functional. The Edit History section only appears when changeLogs.length > 0, so new projects without edits won't show it. Test with RE projects that have been edited (like 'Test Project 056643').

feature_1_gm_edit_button.description: GM can see 'Edit' button on RE projects in the Planning tab of the Command Center
feature_1_gm_edit_button.evidence: Screenshot 02_gm_planning_tab.png shows 8 Edit buttons visible on RE projects

feature_2_gm_edit_dialog.description: GM can open the RE edit dialog and modify fields (project name, scope items, notes, etc.)
feature_2_gm_edit_dialog.evidence: Screenshot 03_gm_edit_dialog.png shows full edit form with all fields editable

feature_3_gm_save_changes.description: GM can save changes to an RE project successfully
feature_3_gm_save_changes.evidence: Backend test test_04_gm_can_update_re_project PASSED, UI save shows 'RE Project updated' toast

feature_4_change_log_created.description: After GM saves, a change log entry is created showing the GM's name, role, and what changed
feature_4_change_log_created.evidence: Screenshot 04_gm_edit_dialog_scrolled.png shows Edit History with 'Arun Mehta' + 'general_manager' badge + timestamps + field changes

feature_5_planning_sees_change_log.description: Planning user can see the change log (Edit History) in their RE edit dialog showing GM's edits
feature_5_planning_sees_change_log.evidence: Screenshot 12_planning_approved_dialog.png shows Planning user viewing Edit History with GM's changes

feature_6_change_log_format.description: Change log shows correct user name, role badge, timestamp, and field changes with old/new values
feature_6_change_log_format.evidence: Change log entries show: user_name='Arun Mehta', role badge='general_manager', timestamp='20 Mar 2026, 5:58 pm', changes with red strikethrough old values → green new values

feature_7_both_roles_see_history.description: Both GM and Planning can see the Edit History section in their respective edit dialogs
feature_7_both_roles_see_history.evidence: GM dashboard edit dialog (03_gm_edit_dialog.png) and Planning edit dialog (12_planning_approved_dialog.png) both show Edit History

backend.PATCH_endpoint: PATCH /api/crm/re-projects/{re_project_id} - Tracks changes and creates log entries

frontend.GMDashboard.jsx: Lines 280-345: RE edit handler functions, Lines 1324-1490: RE Edit Dialog UI with Edit History
frontend.REProjectsPage.jsx: Line 230: canEdit includes 'general_manager', Lines 693-728: Change Log UI rendering

notes: Edit History section only displays when changeLogs.length > 0
New projects without edits will not show Edit History until first edit is made
Rate limiting on demo-login API caused 2 backend test failures - not actual bugs
